description: User pauses the cursor over the 'Select' button for a Qantas flight option, likely evaluating the deal details.
frame_description: Flight search results page showing multiple airline options with 'Select' buttons.

description: User moves the cursor over the 'Track prices' button and flight information area.
The '2+ stops' filter checkbox is unchecked, leading to a change in the displayed results.
The UI updates to show no matching flights for the current filters and displays hotel deals instead.
frame_description: Screen showing 'Sorry, there aren't any flights that match your filters' and hotel recommendations.

description: The '2+ stops' filter checkbox is re-checked, which restores the flight search results.
The cursor rapidly alternates between the top-left corner and the right side of the screen, indicating user frustration or confusion during a page update.
